decisions.label: note
decisions.message: CRITICAL FINDING: saveData.lua only updates at turn boundaries, NOT per-mech-action. Visual confirms PunchMech fired Titan Fist and moved. bActive does NOT change until End Turn is pressed. Per-mech verify must use visual/screenshot confirmation, not save file.

decisions.label: solve
actions: PunchMech, move (3,1)->(5,2), fire Titan Fist at (5,3)
TankMech, move (3,3)->(3,2), fire Taurus Cannon at (4,2)

decisions.label: note
decisions.message: RUN LOST at Turn 3. Grid power hit 0. 3 buildings threatened, only 2 mechs (ArtiMech destroyed Turn 2). Solver tried to move PunchMech to building tile (5,2) — invalid move. Buildings at (3,4), (3,5), (3,6) were not protected. Post-mortem: solver needs better threat prioritization with fewer mechs. Also lost Volatile Vek bonus objective.
